title: Healthcare, medicine, nutrition and clinic safety scenarios
description: Original educational scenarios for study only. They are not diagnostic, prescribing, or emergency medical advice; learners should follow local clinical policies and consult qualified healthcare professionals.

sources.name: Ministry of Health Malaysia CPG: Management of Obesity, 2nd edition 2023
U.S. National Library of Medicine MedlinePlus

question.en: Before collecting a specimen or giving a medicine, what is the safest first check?
question.zh-Hans: 在采集样本或给予药物前，最安全的第一项检查是什么？
question.zh-Hant: 在採集樣本或給予藥物前，最安全的第一項檢查是什麼？
question.ms: Sebelum mengambil spesimen atau memberi ubat, apakah semakan pertama yang paling selamat?

en: What should clinic staff verify before a specimen collection or medication administration?

text.en: Use the approved patient-identification process and match the order, patient, and intended procedure.
Use the waiting-room seat number only.
Ask another patient to confirm the name.
Skip verification when the clinic is busy.

question.en: A patient says they previously had a serious reaction to a medicine listed on today’s order. What should clinic staff do?
question.zh-Hans: 患者说以前对今天医嘱中的一种药物有严重反应。诊所工作人员应该怎么做？
question.zh-Hant: 病人表示以前對今天醫囑中的一種藥物有嚴重反應。診所工作人員應該怎麼做？
question.ms: Pesakit mengatakan pernah mengalami reaksi serius terhadap ubat dalam pesanan hari ini. Apakah yang perlu dilakukan oleh kakitangan klinik?

en: A patient reports a serious previous medication reaction. What is the safest next action?

text.en: Pause the process, document and verify the allergy, and promptly alert the prescribing or pharmacy professional.
Tell the patient to take it anyway.
Delete the allergy from the record.
Substitute a medicine without authorization.

question.en: A patient is transferred from a clinic to a hospital and brings several medicine bottles. What information should be reconciled?
question.zh-Hans: 患者从诊所转到医院并带来几瓶药。应核对哪些信息？
question.zh-Hant: 病人從診所轉到醫院並帶來幾瓶藥。應核對哪些資訊？
question.ms: Pesakit dipindahkan dari klinik ke hospital dan membawa beberapa botol ubat. Maklumat apakah yang perlu dipadankan?

en: What should be checked during medication reconciliation at a care transition?

text.en: All current medicines, dose instructions, allergies, supplements, recent changes, and what the patient actually takes.
Only the colour of each tablet.
Only medicines prescribed by the newest clinic.
Nothing if the bottles look familiar.

question.en: A patient asks whether they should stop a prescribed medicine because of an online post. What is the safest response?
question.zh-Hans: 患者因网上帖子询问是否应停止处方药。最安全的回应是什么？
question.zh-Hant: 病人因網上帖子詢問是否應停止處方藥。最安全的回應是什麼？
question.ms: Pesakit bertanya sama ada perlu berhenti mengambil ubat preskripsi kerana hantaran dalam talian. Apakah respons paling selamat?

en: How should clinic staff respond when a patient wants to stop medicine based on social media advice?

text.en: Record the concern and direct the patient to the prescriber or pharmacist for individualized advice; do not independently change the treatment.
Tell the patient to double the next dose.
Guarantee that the online post is correct.
Change the prescription without review.

question.en: A staff member moves from examining one patient to touching equipment used for another patient. What safety practice is essential?
question.zh-Hans: 工作人员从检查一名患者转为接触另一名患者使用的设备。哪项安全措施必不可少？
question.zh-Hant: 工作人員從檢查一名病人轉為接觸另一名病人使用的設備。哪項安全措施不可或缺？
question.ms: Seorang kakitangan bergerak daripada memeriksa seorang pesakit kepada menyentuh peralatan untuk pesakit lain. Apakah amalan keselamatan yang penting?

en: What infection-control action is needed between patient-care activities?

text.en: Follow the clinic’s hand-hygiene and equipment-cleaning procedure at the appropriate moments.
Rely on gloves without changing or cleaning them.
Wait until the end of the shift.
Use the same disposable item for every patient.

question.en: A person at reception reports severe breathing difficulty and appears confused. What should non-clinical staff do?
question.zh-Hans: 一名到诊所接待处的人报告严重呼吸困难并看起来神志不清。非临床工作人员应该怎么做？
question.zh-Hant: 一名到診所接待處的人表示嚴重呼吸困難並看起來神志不清。非臨床工作人員應該怎麼做？
question.ms: Seseorang di kaunter penerimaan melaporkan kesukaran bernafas yang teruk dan kelihatan keliru. Apakah yang perlu dilakukan oleh kakitangan bukan klinikal?

en: A person at reception has a potentially life-threatening symptom. What is the appropriate response?

text.en: Activate the clinic’s urgent-response or emergency pathway and immediately alert qualified clinical staff.
Ask the person to wait quietly until routine registration is complete.
Recommend an internet search instead of assessment.
Provide a prescription from memory.

question.en: Which combination best represents the core principles of a healthy diet?
question.zh-Hans: 哪一组最能代表健康饮食的核心原则？
question.zh-Hant: 哪一組最能代表健康飲食的核心原則？
question.ms: Gabungan manakah paling baik mewakili prinsip teras pemakanan sihat?

en: What are the four broad principles of a healthy diet?

text.en: Adequacy, balance, moderation, and diversity.
Restriction, supplements, fasting, and uniformity.
Sugar, salt, frying, and portion size only.
Calories, branding, price, and convenience only.

question.en: A pregnant person with a chronic condition asks for a highly restrictive diet plan from a general poster. What is the safest approach?
question.zh-Hans: 患有慢性病的孕妇要求根据普通海报制定严格饮食计划。最安全的做法是什么？
question.zh-Hant: 患有慢性病的孕婦要求根據一般海報制定嚴格飲食計劃。最安全的做法是什麼？
question.ms: Seorang yang hamil dan mempunyai penyakit kronik meminta pelan diet sangat ketat berdasarkan poster umum. Apakah pendekatan paling selamat?

en: When should general nutrition information be replaced with individualized professional assessment?

text.en: Provide general education only and refer for individualized assessment by the appropriate healthcare professional or dietitian.
Prescribe the same restrictive plan used for everyone.
Recommend stopping all prescribed treatment.
Ignore pregnancy and medical history.

question.en: A health educator is helping a generally healthy adult improve diet quality. Which advice aligns with broad public-health guidance?
question.zh-Hans: 健康教育者帮助一名一般健康的成年人改善饮食质量。哪项建议符合广泛的公共卫生指导？
question.zh-Hant: 健康教育者協助一名一般健康的成年人改善飲食質量。哪項建議符合廣泛的公共衛生指導？
question.ms: Pendidik kesihatan membantu orang dewasa yang umumnya sihat memperbaiki kualiti pemakanan. Nasihat manakah selaras dengan panduan kesihatan awam?

en: What general dietary advice is consistent with healthy-diet guidance?

text.en: Emphasize varied, minimally processed foods and limit excess free sugars, sodium, and unhealthy fats.
Avoid all carbohydrates and all fruit.
Use supplements instead of food variety.
Treat one diet as suitable for every person.

question.en: A clinic is implementing Malaysia’s obesity guideline. Which assessment approach is most appropriate to discuss with the clinical team?
question.zh-Hans: 诊所正在实施马来西亚肥胖指南。哪种评估方法最适合与临床团队讨论？
question.zh-Hant: 診所正在實施馬來西亞肥胖指南。哪種評估方法最適合與臨床團隊討論？
question.ms: Sebuah klinik melaksanakan garis panduan obesiti Malaysia. Pendekatan penilaian manakah yang sesuai dibincangkan dengan pasukan klinikal?

en: What measurements are included in the Malaysian obesity screening approach?

text.en: Use the guideline’s BMI and waist-circumference assessment approach, then assess related conditions under clinical supervision.
Use appearance alone without measurements.
Diagnose from a single social-media photograph.
Ignore current treatments and medical history.

question.en: A patient’s nutrition, medication, and chronic-disease needs overlap. What workflow is safest?
question.zh-Hans: 患者的营养、药物和慢性病需求相互关联。哪种工作流程最安全？
question.zh-Hant: 病人的營養、藥物和慢性病需求互相關聯。哪種工作流程最安全？
question.ms: Keperluan pemakanan, ubat dan penyakit kronik pesakit saling berkaitan. Apakah aliran kerja paling selamat?

en: When several health needs overlap, what care approach should a clinic coordinate?

text.en: Coordinate the appropriate multidisciplinary referral and share relevant information through approved channels.
Let each staff member give unrelated advice independently.
Stop all care until the patient researches it alone.
Share the patient’s information publicly.

question.en: A patient wants to add an herbal supplement while taking prescription medicines. What should the pharmacy assistant do?
question.zh-Hans: 患者在服用处方药时想添加草本补充剂。药房助理应该怎么做？
question.zh-Hant: 病人在服用處方藥時想添加草本補充劑。藥房助理應該怎麼做？
question.ms: Pesakit mahu menambah suplemen herba ketika mengambil ubat preskripsi. Apakah yang perlu dilakukan pembantu farmasi?

en: What is the safest response when a patient wants to combine supplements with prescription medicine?

text.en: Record the complete product and medicine list and refer the interaction question to a pharmacist or prescriber.
Assure the patient that natural products never interact.
Tell the patient to replace prescribed medicine with the supplement.
Guess the dose from the product advertisement.
